programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hook, Line and Lemur
programme.desc: Summer's coming to an end, but Dr. Pol's clients are still rushing in!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: May the Horse Be With You
programme.desc: Constipated cats and grassy horses come through the clinic.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: New Cats on the Block
programme.desc: The clinic is busy with poisoned pups, sassy cats, and new feline neighbours.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Bark 'n Stormy
programme.desc: It's going to be a barking good time this week.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Meow-y Christmas
programme.desc: Santa Paws is coming to town.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Kung Fu Biting
programme.desc: The docs must help four dogs who've been attacked.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Of Mice and Macaws
programme.desc: New doc Nicole Arcy learns from the pros at PVS and treating all kinds of animals.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Beauty and the Bees
programme.desc: Summer is in full swing and PVS is abuzz with ducks, pups and all sorts of emergencies.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: A Pol for All Seasons
programme.desc: When clients are not able to travel, the docs hit the road to help animals near and far.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Ghosts of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: A mysterious artifact might be evidence that Vikings reached the American Midwest, and to investigate this controversial theory, archaeologists build a Viking boat to test if their ships could manage a dangerous 1,000-mile journey over the Great Lakes.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Relic of Mystery
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare teams up with a Midwestern history enthusiast to investigate a mysterious relic that could be evidence of Viking settlement in America centuries before Columbus, but some think it's a hoax.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Curses and Ghosts
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate the man accused of forging evidence of Vikings in America, testing a crucial piece of evidence with DNA analysis: an ancient skull that may have alien origins.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Viking Confidential
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard need to find more artifacts to support their case, so they arrange to meet a mysterious man with knowledge of the runestone at a secret location where he has something important to show them.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Devil Monkey of Doom
programme.desc: A camera in Hungary captures a creature unlike any known animal species launching itself into the path of a cyclist; using the latest imaging tech, experts investigate to determine if this could be evidence of a laboratory experiment gone horribly wrong.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Unearthed: Nero's Lost Palace
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the scandals and secrets of Nero and his lost palace. Using cutting-edge technology, experts may confirm if the infamous emperor burned down Rome so his could build his golden wonder.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Twin Towers: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: New evidence recovered from the site of the World Trade Center's Twin Towers reveals answers to the greatest mysteries of these modern marvels, and using cutting-edge science and technology, experts investigate the science behind why they collapsed.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Hindenburg
programme.desc: When the Nazi airship Hindenburg exploded in a giant ball of fire, the world's largest aircraft in history became one of its greatest catastrophes, and now, new technology might finally reveal what caused the fatal crash and if it was an act of sabotage.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of Seahenge
programme.desc: A prehistoric megastructure emerges from the sands of an English shore that could reveal lost mysteries to the Bronze Age; using pioneering technology and 3-D imaging analysis, experts investigate and uncover dark, ancient rituals once performed here.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ruins of Cannibal City
programme.desc: When an extreme drought hits Spain, the ruins of a long-lost civilization suddenly emerge, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate evidence of ancient cannibalism.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Temple of Blood
programme.desc: An ancient man-made volcano might reveal buried treasure and bloody human sacrifice. When NASA discovers a strange pattern in the Arctic ice, experts investigate if it has alien origins. A mystery in the Sahara might have a sinister explanation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Zombietown USA
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of an abandoned town hidden in the American wilderness, and as experts analyze this new evidence, they reveal what this strange place has to do with a top-secret military plan to battle an army of the undead.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Goliath
programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Special sneak peek of the new season of Mysteries of the Abandoned.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: New satellite evidence reveals a mysterious spiral structure from space, and experts speculate that it could be the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Tombs of the Gold Kingdom
programme.desc: Strange satellite images taken above the Nile Valley could point investigators to long-lost relics buried in an unexplored city of the dead. What they find could reveal new secrets of Kush, a once-mighty kingdom of untold gold and treasure.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Special sneak peek of the new season of Mysteries of the Abandoned.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Who Built Supervillain Island?
programme.desc: A satellite spots a set of huge arrows in the badlands of the American west. A blood red waterfall stains Antarctica's snows. A plague of huge holes in the Siberian landscape.

programme.title: Betrayed: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Confident, motorcycle-riding Diane Snellen is a single mom trying to make her way in the world while navigating the dating scene of Georgetown, KY. But her path in life comes to an abrupt end when she's brutally stabbed in her own home.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Two-Faced
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a San Francisco businessman is found floating in the California Aqueduct. Investigators initially suspect a family member, but without evidence, the case goes cold. It will take detectives several decades to find the real killer.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: The Evil Inside
programme.desc: At work, Kerri Harris and her friend discover a camera secreted in the ladies' restroom. Police examine the evidence, but less than 24 hours into their investigation, Kerri is found stabbed to death in her office. Her co-workers are just feet away.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Book of James
programme.desc: An affair between a married pastor and a member of his flock takes a shocking turn when he proposes a polygamous relationship with his wife. But an unexpected arrival threatens their pledge of secrecy.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: The 22-Year Itch
programme.desc: In January 2003, Curt and Donna Thorngren's 22-year marriage, destroyed by debt, deceit, and drug addiction, ended in murder.

programme.title: Web of Lies: People You May Know
programme.desc: Single mom Lorianna Parker is excited when she meets popular good-looking Corey Davis online, and filled with hope as their friendship blossoms. But when she goes to meet him in the flesh, her dream date turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Could Hear Her Calling My Name
programme.desc: A young girl disappears after school. Her last known steps are caught on surveillance cameras, which led investigators to two dark minds who carried out one of the most sinister, depraved crimes imaginable.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Am The Devil
programme.desc: A missing Colorado woman's roommate claims she'll do anything to help find her, but investigators fear they may have a rare female psychopath on their hands. Later, a killer's angry outbursts could be real, or just an act put on by a skilled manipulator.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Buried Dreams
programme.desc: In 2007 in Bethany, Oklahoma, a young pregnant woman goes missing. Police desperately try to retrace her last steps, and unearth more than just the secrets she harbored.

programme.title: Web of Lies: People You May Know
programme.desc: Single mom Lorianna Parker is excited when she meets popular good-looking Corey Davis online, and filled with hope as their friendship blossoms. But when she goes to meet him in the flesh, her dream date turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Could Hear Her Calling My Name
programme.desc: A young girl disappears after school. Her last known steps are caught on surveillance cameras, which led investigators to two dark minds who carried out one of the most sinister, depraved crimes imaginable.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Am The Devil
programme.desc: A missing Colorado woman's roommate claims she'll do anything to help find her, but investigators fear they may have a rare female psychopath on their hands. Later, a killer's angry outbursts could be real, or just an act put on by a skilled manipulator.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Buried Dreams
programme.desc: In 2007 in Bethany, Oklahoma, a young pregnant woman goes missing. Police desperately try to retrace her last steps, and unearth more than just the secrets she harbored.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: The 22-Year Itch
programme.desc: In January 2003, Curt and Donna Thorngren's 22-year marriage, destroyed by debt, deceit, and drug addiction, ended in murder.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Under Siege
programme.desc: A woman calls 911, saying her husband is exchanging gunfire with intruders, and her toddler is outside with them. Police find the boy safe, though the husband is dead.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Tears For My Mother
programme.desc: A man calls 911 claiming he found his ex-girlfriend dead, and his behavior on the call leads police to wonder if he could be involved. Investigators tirelessly gather evidence to convict a killer whose unchecked rage left a young son motherless.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Black Sheep
programme.desc: When the four members of the Mark family are found murdered in their home, police suspect someone close to the family is responsible. The bizarre truth will shake the small town of Cedar Falls and devastate the surviving members of the Mark family.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Hearts of Darkness
programme.desc: In what became known as "The Crime of The Century," a boy from one of Chicago's wealthiest families is kidnapped and found murdered. The ensuing investigation zeroes in on the wealthy, thrill-seeking college students Nathan Leopold and Richard Loeb.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Sins of the Mother
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite goes missing, police wonder if two of the most wanted con artists are behind her disappearance.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Murder on the Sunset Strip
programme.desc: In 1980, a brutal serial killer abducts women from downtown Los Angeles and dumps their bodies in bizarre places. When an unidentified caller telephones police, they must decipher fact from fiction as the woman confesses to a bizarre series of events.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Midnight Murders
programme.desc: Carla Stefaniak, a spirited Florida insurance agent with a passion for travel, heads to Costa Rica. But on the day she's supposed to return, she vanishes. And in 2014, 19-year-old college student Pravin Varughese disappears after a party.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Guns and Secrets
programme.desc: One young woman is found with a shotgun wound to her head shortly after moving in with her new boyfriend. Then, a couple planning their wedding are gunned down in their own backyard.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Richard Davis runs up to an ambulance parked at a gas station, clutching a gunshot wound to his abdomen. He is rushed to a hospital, but sadly succumbs to his injuries and now it's up to Atlanta's elite homicide unit to figure out what happened.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Down the Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: A young woman craving independence moves out of her parents' house and in with her kind-hearted boss. But independence comes with a price, and when she is unable to pay, she loses control and more than one 'innocent' is slaughtered.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Sinner and The Saint
programme.desc: When a troubled young man befriends Jessica Vega via social media, the kind-hearted college student and single mom does her best to steer him towards a better path. Unfortunately, her good intentions will eventually come back to haunt her.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Mother of It All
programme.desc: A lively slumber party turns into a nightmare when a loving mother, Dianne Watts, her young daughter, and her daughter's friend, are murdered. The town of McMinnville is turned upside down, knowing there is a killer amongst them.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: The Honey Trap
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat; ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned Double Agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Boyfriend to Support
programme.desc: In jail for fraud, Steven Russell falls in love with inmate Philip Morris. When Morris is released, Russell is desperate to be reunited. He escapes from jail with elaborate cons. Once out, the two live a lavish life, supported by scams that alert the FBI.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Shot in the Leg
programme.desc: When a friend is fired from a restaurant, Konh Chung Bounnam and his friends decide to rob it. The plan goes awry and three people are killed. His friends are caught but Bounnam stays free. He hides until his need for money gets the FBI's attention.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Country Legend's Tour Bus
programme.desc: Christopher Gay is in jail for petty theft and known for his ability to escape. But on top of this, Gay is known for his choice in getaway vehicles. This cross-country chase is hardly a joy ride, as the cops are resolute on capturing him for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Hide in a Swamp
programme.desc: Dominic Reddick flees prison and heads to Georgia. Someone calls the cops on him and he escapes to the woods. He eats donuts form the dumpster outside a shop, but to his surprise the cops are waiting inside.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Wear a Pink Shirt
programme.desc: Abraham Cavazos shot a man at a party and fled to Mexico, where multiple women supported him. Although he changed identities, locations and girlfriends, the authorities found him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Country Legend's Tour Bus
programme.desc: Christopher Gay is in jail for petty theft and known for his ability to escape. But on top of this, Gay is known for his choice in getaway vehicles. This cross-country chase is hardly a joy ride, as the cops are resolute on capturing him for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Boyfriend to Support

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Civil War Conspiracies
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Past and Present
programme.desc: Many researchers believe we have been visited by otherworldly spacecraft since the dawn of man. Trace the evidence from the history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and through the art of the Renaissance period.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: Through amazing first-hand accounts from pilots and astronauts, we'll learn that sightings of mysterious, unknown objects in our skies are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: After decades of UFO research focusing on the skies, Unidentified Submergible Objects may be the next frontier of study. Newly declassified documents and first-hand accounts are leading researchers to believe that UFOs may be closer than we ever thought.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Mud and Steel in New Mexico
programme.desc: Roger heads to the heart of New Mexico where cooking with fire is taken to new culinary heights with mud and steel. Roger visits Comida de Campos in Embudo, a farm and cooking school where delicious feasts are cooked in cone-shaped clay ovens.

programme.desc: Roger is in central California for two meat-filled cookouts. This region is home to many vineyards, but Paso de Record Vineyard is what catches Roger's interest.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Firefighter Pups / Hike Paw
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Mouseke-Calendar
programme.desc: When the wind blows way all the pages of Minnie's daily calendar, Mickey and pals help her put it back together again and keep all of her plans up to date.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Sir Goofs-a-lot
programme.desc: Goofy sets out on a quest to retrieve three items in order to be knighted the bravest.

programme.title: Bluey: Shops / The Pool / Blue Mountains
programme.desc: Bluey and her friends want to play a game of 'Shops'; Bluey and her family take a trip to the pool; The family plays with hand puppets.

programme.title: Bluey: Squash / Charades / Bingo
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Safari, So Goody
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Hatches an Egg
programme.desc: The clubhouse pals discover a mystery egg among Goofy's rock collection; they try to find out what kind of animal is inside in order to return it to its mother. In the meantime, Donald Duck serves as a reluctant babysitter when the little egg develops.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Clarabelle's Clubhouse Carnival
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends put on a fun carnival.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Special Delivery
programme.desc: Donald gets upset when all of his friends get mail, but he doesn't get any.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Ball
programme.desc: Pluto loses his favourite ball when he's outside playing with it and bounces it too high.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Bubble Bath
programme.desc: When Pluto's bubble bath gets out of hand, Mickey and Pluto each get stuck in a Giant Bubble and start floating away from the Clubhouse.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Master Fang's Secret / Aerodylan
programme.desc: Armadylan and Catboy compete over an exclusive Master Fang comic, thinking it contains a hero secret. Armadylan loses the PJs’ special jet to Night Ninja.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Lab Four / Feelin' Antsy
programme.desc: When a performance by Bob's favourite band, The Walruses, is canceled, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to ensure the show goes on. Then, when ants invade playcare, the pugs must find a way to get them out.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo and Rolly's Playcare Picnic Party/ Judge Rolly
programme.desc: The Pugs throw Keia a picnic when she can't attend the Playcare's picnic in the park! Rolly gets carried away when he designates himself as judge to keep the peace at Playcare!

programme.title: Pikwik Pack: Giddyup Ol' Blue! / Stick Together
programme.desc: Suki the hedgehog and her team deliver packages to the residents of Pikwik.

programme.title: Bluey: Fairies/ Work/ Bumpy and the Wise Old Wolfhound
programme.desc: Bluey thinks there are Fairies in the backyard; Bluey and Bingo are hired by Dad at the drainpipe factory; Dad and Bluey send Bingo a video.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Gonzo's Bubble Trouble/ Fozzie Can't Bear It
programme.desc: Follow the Muppet Babies on various adventures as they let their imaginations take flight.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie
programme.desc: The pups get trained by a puppyball expert for the puppyball championship. Hedgie helps the pups catch the veggie bandit in Bob's vegetable patch.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Surfin' Birds/ Grandpa's Great Adventure
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Smiley-est Shark/ The Super Duper Brother
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Toon Bops: Dance Dance Dancing
programme.desc: A fun song about the whole family singing and dancing along in every room of the house.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Donald's Dilemma/ The Royal-ympics!
programme.desc: Donald's day of doing chores is derailed when his Uncle Manny pays him a surprise visit. Princess Olivia of Royalandia asks the Happy Helpers for help with the Royal-ympics.

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Stop That Spinosaurus! / The Spookasaurus
programme.desc: A rampaging dinosaur threatens to cause havoc. When Jon gets spooked by a campfire story about a legendary dinosaur, he doesn't want to admit it to Miguel and Min.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Big Jon Big Trouble/ Min's Quest
programme.desc: Jon gets overwhelmed when he tries to tame a dinosaur himself. Then, Min learns about perseverance when she helps a mother brontosaurus.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Light for the Lighthouse / Music City Mishap
programme.desc: When the pugs find out that the light on Bob's favourite lighthouse isn't working, they go on a mission to fix it. Then, While in Nashville, Bingo and Rolly find a lost guitar and go on a mission to return it to its rightful owner.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Mission to the Moon / Say Cheese
programme.desc: A baby wolf longs to see the moon, so Pip and Freddy embark on a mission to make her dream come true. During photo day, JP entrusts a photo-ready Lucky to Pip and Freddy’s care.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fastest Flier / Best Friends Wherever
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach Ava that there is more to a delivery than speed. When Mia can't say goodbye to her friend, Chloe, the Junior Fliers show her that they can keep in touch!

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Oh Brother / Fozzie's Boo Boo Patrol
programme.desc: Follow the Muppet Babies on various adventures as they let their imaginations take flight.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Legend of El Tomahto / Interplanetary Kickle Ball
programme.desc: Follow the Muppet Babies on various adventures as they let their imaginations take flight.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pups in the Apple / Won't You Be My Puppy
programme.desc: On the morning of the Playcare bake sale, Bob is devastated when he can't make his "Big Apple" pie because he's out of apples. Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find their favorite television host's special sweater in time for his show.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puppies and Pandas / Orange You Glad?
programme.desc: The Pugs are on a mission to recreate a video of a panda sneezing in China. Lollie enlists the Pugs to fetch some oranges for Ana's daily orange juice.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Swellview's Got Talent
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger wonder why talent show contestants keep losing consciousness, so they seek help from Charlotte and Schwoz.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Balloons of Doom
programme.desc: When Dr. Minyak takes the Man Fans hostage, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to find a way to rescue them without Dr. Minyak seeing them move.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Rock Box Dump
programme.desc: When a report comes out that Kid Danger's super power is actually an illness, Kid Danger has to convince Swellview that it is a huge misunderstanding.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Date of Emergency
programme.desc: Phoebe fakes a romance after feeling left out with her friends all in relationships, but keeping her lie going proves to be harder than she expected.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Smells Like Team Spirit
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max must work together on series of superhero team building exercises, but their different approaches to training puts their future as a crime fighting team at risk.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Max to the Future
programme.desc: Concerned that he isn't considered a valuable superhero, Max creates a machine that can predict future crimes, but when it doesn't work, he spins a web of lies to keep the truth from Phoebe.

programme.title: Danger Force: Villains' Night
programme.desc: Danger Force and Captain Man go undercover as bad guys to catch a criminal.

programme.title: Danger Force: Prank War
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Prank War
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: The Loud House: Everybody Loves Leni/ Middle Men
programme.desc: Torn between her work friends and her school friends, Leni tries to bring everyone together. When Lincoln and Clyde go to tour the middle school, Lynn gives them some questionable advice.

programme.title: The Loud House: Jeers for Fears/ Tea Tale Heart
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears./Lola discovers Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it – no matter what Lucy says.

programme.title: The Loud House: Predict Ability / Driving Ambition
programme.desc: Lincoln fears he's predictable, so vows to change up his routine. Then, Lori gets the yips when she learns the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play.

programme.title: The Loud House: April Fools Rules/ Cereal Offender
programme.desc: Every April Fool’s Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Flea Market/ How to Train Your Carl
programme.desc: Carl gets lost in the zoo after sneaking away from his family to find a Komodo dragon. Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Crying Dame/ Anti Social
programme.desc: To get Lily to stop crying the kids give her an old singing toy from the attic but it quickly drives them crazy. Dad declares war on the kids' devices so they decide to show him how great they are.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's Place/ Plankton Gets the Boot
programme.desc: When SpongeBob cooks at home, Mr. Krabs' customers leave his restaurant and head for SpongeBob's Place.When Plankton gets kicked out of the house, it's up to SpongeBob to teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hello Bikini Bottom!
programme.desc: A concert promoter wants to send SpongeBob and Squidward on the road, until greedy Mr. Krabs decides to manage them and their 'world tour,' himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Digs/ Krabs a la Mode
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab and turns it into an ice skating rink.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick! The Game/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new boardgame. Later, SpongeBob and Squidward flush Mr. Krabs' safe and must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: It's Pony: Delivery Pony/ Magic Annie
programme.desc: Annie and Pony's new fruit and vegetable delivery service is threatened by a big corporation. Annie needs to find the perfect Mother's Day gift. Pony is convinced that Annie's magic trick is just the thing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale of a Birthday/ Karate Island
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wants to give his daughter the best birthday ever. SpongeBob is assigned the task of finding out what she would like; SpongeBob is invited to a karate competition on the mysterious Karate Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sharks vs. Pods/ CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head with the Sharks. Plankton creates an evil clone of SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Chaperone
programme.desc: When Mr. Krab's daughter Pearl is stood up for her prom, SpongeBob agrees to step in.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy attempts to study Patrick and SpongeBob. Mr. Krab announces he's getting married.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Picture Day/ Pat No Pay/ Blackjack
programme.desc: SpongeBob must attend Picture Day for the Boating School Year Book; Patrick steals.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inmates of Summer/ To Save a Squirrel
programme.desc: Instead of getting on the ship headed for summer camp, SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners on their way to jail on Inferno Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goodbye, Krabby Patty?
programme.desc: Squidward must make Patrick and SpongeBob friends again after they learn that sponges and sea stars aren't ususally friends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: 20,000 Patties Under the Sea/ The Battle of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs turn an old submarine into a mobile Krusty Krab. When Patrick and SpongeBob discover they have clashing views on cleanliness, their disagreement blows up into an epic battle.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Lonely Mutation of Baxter Stockman
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman kidnaps and threatens to mutate April.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Newtralized!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Wrath of Tiger Claw
programme.desc: Tiger Claw returns and sets out to destroy the Ninja Turtles at any cost.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Pizza Face
programme.desc: Mikey discovers that a new mutant is trying to attack and capture people using living pizzas, but he struggles to convince the others who don't believe him.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Legend of Kuro Kabuto

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Plan 10
programme.desc: Ralph's hot-headed impulsiveness lands him in deep trouble when he accidentally damages a machine that forces him to switch minds with a Kraang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Vengeance is Mine
programme.desc: Leo goes behind Splinter's back when he stages a rescue for Karai, whose desire for revenge against Shredder brings about grave consequences for all.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Jeanette's Secret Garden/ Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Jeanette decides to plant a garden on the school grounds, but Bocarter manages to install vending machines instead.When Alvin finds a treasure map in Miss Croner's basement, the Chipmunks set off in search of lost treasure.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: I Will Survive/ Alvin's Got a Brand New Bag
programme.desc: When Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner. Alvin accidentally ruins Brittany's favorite new bag and must come up with a way to replace it.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: What a Gem/ Family Spirit
programme.desc: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave to go to the big soccer game.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Spoiler-Itis/ Something's Fishy
programme.desc: When Alvin is accused of revealing spoilers for everyone's favorite TV show, he agrees not to speak for 24 hours. Alvin and Simon think Theodore's pet goldfish has died.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Mama Drama/ Ballet Boys
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany learn parenting isn't easy when they have to care for a robot baby for a school assignment.When Alvin's soccer team struggles, the coach makes the team learn ballet to help with their conditioning.

programme.desc: Timmy watches his favorite show about a talking car and wishes he had his own talking car.

programme.desc: Timmy gets babysat by Dad's dad; Timmy and Dad come upon Dad's favourite childhood book.

programme.desc: Max and Phoebe take Billy to the hospital when he hurts his thumb while they are babysitting him. After Max sees a needle and faints, they all must make sure the doctors don't see his brain scan which could expose their powers.

programme.title: Jalen & Jacoby

programme.title: Around the Horn

programme.title: UFC Fight Flashback: McGregor vs. Diaz

programme.desc: Three women a day are killed by a former or current husband or boyfriend. Nicole Beverly is desperately trying to avoid that fate. Chris Cuomo goes inside the epidemic of intimate partner violence that turns lethal for so many women.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: The Killer Twins
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo tries to find answers to the age-old question of nature versus nurture, asking if the desire to kill could be a genetic trait.

programme.desc: Jennifer Asbenson tells Chris Cuomo her terrifying encounter with serial killer Andrew Urdiales. Even though she spent years telling people her story, not even her own mother believed her until Urdiales confessed to several other crimes.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 2)
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo conducts the last interview serial killer Andrew Urdiales will ever give.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: The Wealthy Widow

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Trust Fund Terror
programme.desc: The brutal slaying of a Fresno family leaves one heir to the family fortune and investigators searching for answers.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Fatal Fence Feud

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Lethal Brawl
programme.desc: When a mother and recovering addict is stabbed while standing up to the neighborhood bully, grainy video and unreliable witnesses stand in the way of investigators determining who was holding the knife that killed her.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Murderous Moms
programme.desc: A front yard brawl between two Euclid, Ohio families leaves one person dead and investigators wondering how teenage heartbreak started it all.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Blood and Terror
programme.desc: When a gay rights activist is stabbed to death in his own apartment, police are tasked with tracking down his killer, and in the process, they uncover a dark world of paranoia and delusions lurking in the heart of London.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mega Cash Days: Getcha Cash
programme.desc: Racers who went out in Bracket 1 return to try and stay alive, but one loss will knock them completely. With heavy hitters like Jeff Lutz, Murder Nova and Cody Baker in, being one of the last two standing is not going to be easy.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mountain Brandy
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete head-to-head to see who makes a classic Appalachian tradition called Mountain Brandy. Judged by moonshine legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only the best will have what it takes to be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Tim and his help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery in hopes of turning it from problem to profit. Mark and Digger confront a shiner who's been edging into their territory. Lance surprises Jeff with an unorthodox moonshine ingredient.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Adios, Mr. Still
programme.desc: Gunfire erupts in the bamboo patch just as Josh and Bill fire up their still for the first time this season. Meanwhile Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom run a batch of President George Washington's rye whiskey, and Tickle hits the skids when his still is sabotaged.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: High Proof Cherry Bounce
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make a 300-year-old spirit called Cherry Bounce, a favorite drink of George Washington, nearly lost to time. Josh Owens, whose family kept the recipe alive for generations in the backwoods, joins as guest judge.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Navy Strength Rum
programme.desc: Outlaw shiners and legal distillers compete to distill true Navy Strength Rum, but the bar for entry is 114-proof. With Tickle as honorary pirate and judged by shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one distiller can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Sweet Corn Revenge
programme.desc: After Mike asks the wrong shiner for help, Mark and Digger land a skilled new partner. On a mountain run, Mark and Huck nearly meet the barrel of a gun. Jerry attempts a comeback as a land sale forces him and Mike to abandon their column still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller
programme.desc: A subculture of distillers across America carries on the backwoods tradition of moonshining. Now, judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, America's top legal and outlaw shiners go head to head to see who has what it takes to be called Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Interstate Alliance
programme.desc: Josh and Tickle make a peach brandy-making alliance when Josh lands a windfall of peaches. Mark and Diggers' surplus corn supply mysteriously disappears. Mike and Jerry panic when their column still spews ethanol vapor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Mark and Digger's Big Test
programme.desc: With his partner in quarantine, Digger has much more on the line than shine. Mike and Jerry's moonshine Frankenstein turns on its creators. After decades in the backwoods, mountain man Mark Rogers enlists his dad to run with him for the first time.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Backwoods Is Booming
programme.desc: Mark and Digger deploy an old-world innovation to bring their barrel-aged reserves to market, while Tim attempts to make Tickle's CBD moonshine on a commercial scale. Josh puts himself at the mercy of the mountains' greatest peril: a rookie shiner.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Secrets in the Sword

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A racer modifies his drag boat-almost costing his life; two storm chasers are trapped by a tornado; passengers flee an exploding plane; a military plane crashes and one of the most infamous bridges disintegrates.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Failed Brakes, Snowmobile Mistake
programme.desc: A car crashes into a computer store. A snowmobile jump comes up short. A motorcycle without a driver and a mad bull take aim at a crowd, and a forest fire is caught on camera.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: Calm Before the Storm
programme.desc: The guy have yellowtail action in Big Pine Key while George and Lain learn about coral restoration at Mote Marine Laboratory.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: Elmer Henderson
programme.desc: 97-year-old Elmer Henderson spent 63 days fighting in the jungle in World War II.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Marathon, FL Keys: Dolphin and Blackfin Tuna
programme.desc: George pursues blackfin tuna at Marathon in the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: The Grand Bahama Adventure
programme.desc: Rick and Greg Dornau pursue bonefish and big mutton snapper around the Northern Bahamian Islands.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Got Your Six
programme.desc: Tony cleans up big with the old timer's lost gold. On the brink of ending his season, Fred Lewis' team begins to crack, forcing him to make a big a decision. Rick cashes in his gold to fund his season, leaving his crew to keep the season on track.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Paradise

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut
programme.desc: Two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their Ohio family's cattle ranch.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: One Is Good, Two Is Better

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Running Out of Time

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: J.T.'s Story
programme.desc: J.T. is almost 900lbs with a 100-lb lymphedema mass on his leg and a food addiction that is bound to kill him if he doesn't change. His girlfriend takes him to Houston, but when his behavior drives her away, J.T. is left with only Dr. Now to help.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Carrie's Story
programme.desc: 20 years after her dad died as a result of a botched weight loss surgery, Carrie is on the brink of eating herself to death. To live, she must face the fear and grief of losing her father and end a cycle of toxic behavior with her husband Chris.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Supersized: Wake-Up Call
programme.desc: Tammy and Amy blame each other for their issues in therapy. When Tammy gets devastating news from Dr. Procter, her brother Chris makes a life-altering decision. A very pregnant Amy can't stop overeating, and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Olivia's Story
programme.desc: A woman travels to Houston for surgery following a failed suicide attempt.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Next Time I See You Will Be in New York!
programme.desc: With two weeks until the big I Do's, our next bride is still in the dark but not for long. Randy swaps coasts to give a military veteran the surprise of her life.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: The Bride That Represents America
programme.desc: Randy almost gives nurse LoAles a heart attack when he ambushes her after her shift. Tracey's back for her fitting with more color chaos, and Randy pays a visit to the Cake Boss himself.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Red She Said
programme.desc: Kelly wants to get married in her favourite colour, red, while Beth wants to be the opposite of traditional by wearing black to her wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Expecting Brides
programme.desc: Tisa's looking for a dress that makes her look hot even though she's three months pregnant. Victoria is six months pregnant and looking for a dress for her wedding just eight weeks away.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: What's My Style
programme.desc: Lela doesn't know what she wants and Christiane gets nervous about finding something.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Race Against Time
programme.desc: Edwina has only three months to go before her wedding; Michelle sees her dress for the first time since losing 50 pounds.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Image Is Everything
programme.desc: Randy's day is nonstop as he assists brides and auditions models for his runway show. Bride Emanuela wants a sexy ball gown and she's not afraid to throw her dad's budget out the window. Marlena is finally dress shopping for a wedding years in the making.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: His Opinion...
programme.desc: Taylor brought her fiancé to help her find her dream gown. Brandi shops with her fiancé because she needs his approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Your Mama's Dress
programme.desc: Bride Krystle has decided to share the spotlight with her mom, Kathy. Afrodite and her Greek mother Maria have never agreed about fashion. Lindsey's mom battles multiple sclerosis, so it was important to Lindsey that her mom attends the fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Brides and Their Boys
programme.desc: Dana is shopping with her two bridesmen for an edgy wedding dress. Akisha brings her fiancé's best man to her appointment to represent her husband's opinion.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Race to the Altar
programme.desc: Rita is searching for the perfect 1940's style gown to match her theme. Natalie is searching for an untraditional gown that fits her full size frame.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Family Rules
programme.desc: Tanya brings her outspoken family to help her find a blush-coloured dress. Mary Beth, who has ovarian cancer, is excited to dress shop with three generations of family members. Stella decides to bring only her mother to her first fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sisters Know Best
programme.desc: Amy and her twin sister have very different opinions on dress style, and Heather struggles to please her picky sister.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You're Making Me Blush
programme.desc: Kara fell in love with a statement red dress at another salon, but her future mother-in-law has more traditional gown ideas. Sheena needs a colourful dress to wear to her Indian wedding reception. Later, Tamara tries on her dress for the first time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Day of Challenges
programme.desc: Stefania wants a simple, classic gown, but her family has grander ideas. Precious just had weight loss surgery and needs a gown to fit her shrinking frame. Cheryl’s wedding is in 72 days and she needs a dress to fit her thick frame and tall height.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not What I Was Expecting
programme.desc: Emily, a rock star by night, wants to shake her all-black attire for a traditional gown. Brittany has bright red hair and tattoos and wants to show them off in a sexy lace gown. Lauren is nervous that her friends will think her dress is too unusual.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'll Know It When I See It
programme.desc: Bride Brooke wants a unique, one of kind gown, and won't settle for anything less. Bling queen Amanda hopes to add even more bling to her wedding dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Surprising Turn of Events
programme.desc: At the salon with her mother, Cindy receives a surprise she never expected. Victoria is overwhelmed by an unexpected family reunion at her appointment.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Am a Bride on a Budget
programme.desc: Lauren has a $2,000 budget but is in love with a dress that will blow that budget to shreds. Shoshana is a struggling actress, paying for her own dress to complete her special day. Sara is way over budget and has to convince her father it's worth it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bling, Lace and Cleavage!

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Tornado Terror
programme.desc: A twister outbreak takes over Texas, leaving a storm chaser trapped, with nowhere to run. In Florida, dangerous rip tides drag swimmers out to sea, prompting a daring rescue mission by fellow beachgoers.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Nowhere to Hide
programme.desc: Hurricane Michael rips across the Florida panhandle, trapping a storm chaser and leaving him nowhere to hide. The UK coast guard battles gale force winds to rescue fishermen stranded on the hull of their capsized trawler in rough seas.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Fearsome Flooding
programme.desc: Queensland Australia is shaken by the most devastating flood in its history, forcing residents to wade to safety through crocodile-infested waters. In Kansas in the US, two storm chasers track a terrifying twister as it tears up the neighborhood.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Volcanoes
programme.desc: Exploding glaciers, venomous snakes and ground crumbling earthquakes. How to survive being buried alive by a massive avalanche and what do when face-to-face with scorching lava erupting from a volcano is also featured.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Earthquakes and Blizzards
programme.desc: Video footage of deadly lightning, wicked winds and high-tides are featured. Also, what to do when forced to give birth in a blinding blizzard and how to survive a seismic shocker from 55 stories in the air.

programme.title: Could you Survive? With Creek Stewart: Trapped Trapper
programme.desc: An ATV accident pins an experienced outdoorsman in the Canadian badlands, helpless and immobile as freezing temperatures and coyotes close in.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Winch Wizard

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: The Birth and Death of the Planet

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Abandoned Places

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Raining Spiders

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Zero Donut Thirty
programme.desc: This episode includes a horrifying Halloween mask removal, a couple attacking a hornet's nest and an impossible task: getting the good donuts out of the conference room without being noticed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Pizza Episode
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Eggplant Parm Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe dish out some wild stories with actress Jillian Bell and devour the perfect parmigiana cooked by Chef Dom Dibartolomeo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wanted to film at a dentist's office, and what challenge the crew considers to be one of the greatest. Plus, find out why it's so hard to film on park benches.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Learn what has become a signature part of Q's wardrobe and who among the Jokers is considered the best dancer. Plus, find out which character made his first appearance on an early episode of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Crypto-Crush
programme.desc: The Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Mirror - Interns
programme.desc: The Interns meet some unsettling outsiders and learn just how deep the NSA Internship program goes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here
programme.desc: Michael gives a confused woman the license to speed at the DMV, unclogs a 'crumby' toaster at a return counter, and blows the mind of a beach attendant with a scaly encounter from under the sea.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener
programme.desc: At a cooking class, Michael gets crabby when chopping salad and brings the heat to instantly cook a meatball with his breath. Later, Michael chills his assistant to her bones when a cryotherapy experiment freezes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Snowball
programme.desc: At a ski shop, Michael demonstrates the latest in winter gear: a hat that also makes hot coco. And later, when taking inventory at an abandoned garage, Michael stuns his co-worker when a ghostly violin strikes a chord, all by itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Kind of Like a Seafoam Green
programme.desc: Michael shows shoppers how to manipulate solid objects and reveals how vacuums work. Plus, one man's day becomes very colorful and confusing.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Super Saturn Moon Travel
programme.desc: Tonight, Michael's got exploding fruit, levitation sparklers and a discovery in hemp technology. Plus, a time capsule totally blows one man's mind.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cuban Assimilatory Persea Plant
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pixelated Vision
programme.desc: Michael reels in customers with a new fishing tool and shows off a camera that's literally paper thin. Plus, a day of mini golf turns explosive.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Grins and Giggles
programme.desc: Watch amateur science experiments go wrong. Plus, a road rage clip that will have you rolling.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Worst Days Ever
programme.desc: Watch a baby from hell prank people on the street and see what happens when a farmer becomes a human hay bale.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Hilarious Antics
programme.desc: Reporters mistake their microphones for food, an intense gamer flips out in more ways than one and find out the top six signs it’s time to break up.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Big Time Blunders
programme.desc: Watch what happens when a very public marriage proposal backfires, find out whether cats are better than dogs and learn the best ways to improve your dating profile.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Go Big or Go Hungry
programme.desc: From a colossal 30 pound taco pizza in Atlantic City, New Jersey, to a towering mountain of meat in Seattle, Washington, we're featuring pumped-up portions from across the country that deliver on decadence.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Slice of Heaven
programme.desc: Pizzerias share their most delicious spins on America's favorite pie, from a family-run institution in Chicago specializing in stuffed pizzas to a one-of-a-kind pizza palace slinging outrageous dessert pizzas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Where the Locals Eat
programme.desc: Guy Fieri discovers some great local favourites in Memphis, Virginia and Omaha.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Kraut to Couscous
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's heading out for some global flavor in Brighton, Colorado, San Antonio, Texas, and Tampa, Florida.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: South Dakota Smorgasbord
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hitting Triple-D's 50th state as he heads into Sioux Falls, SD, where a spot is taking chislic to the next level, and he finds the state's first Ethiopian joint. Plus, a Midwest-Southern mashup is putting their own stamp on comfort cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Where the Locals Go
programme.desc: Guy Fieri finds local favourites from a third generation cafeteria outside Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Crepes to Kreplach
programme.desc: Guy finds a crepe joint stacking them 21-high in a butter rum caramel cake, and then a deli cooking stuffed cabbage and kreplach.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homemade and Homebrewed
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's mixing' his love of home cooking with his appreciation of homebrew. In Chicago, Ill., a dive refines small plate Mexican with dishes like shiitake mushroom empanadas and flautas with homemade queso fresco.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pancakes and Pork
programme.desc: A pizza joint makes pies with homemade toppings, and a unique crepe-filled lasagne.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Vegas, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy heads off the Vegas strip, checks out a dive in Buffalo and a Bulgarian tapas joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tacos and Tots
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting the road for joints taking childhood favourites to a gourmet level. In Denver, an old-time bar is going all-out homemade on tater tots, pork rinds and a monster pastrami sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Peppers, Pork and Poutine
programme.desc: This trip, triple "D" goes triple "P" with some standout veggie and meat dishes. In Phoenix, the tattooed, trained chef is putting her spin on chilies and a regional pork dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Indulgent Dishes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's indulging himself in righteous, rich recipes. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a crazy seafood spot is reelin' in off-the-hook gumbo and a spicy mahi specialty. Across town, a mother-daughter team is servin' up savoury lamb ragout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Name That Kitchen
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out some righteous spots that say a lot in the name. In Fort Collins, Colo., an NFL pro and Triple-D alum team up on gangster green chili and mile-high burgers.

programme.desc: Ina Garten is finding new ways to turn the volume up on American classics. She starts by combining coffee chipotle chili powder and red pepper flakes for a spicy dry rub on Grilled New York Strip Steaks.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: On The Road Again
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is traveling to Chicago to give a keynote address at a women's expo. To keep her energy up for this quick trip, she's preparing a breakfast parfait with fig compote, fruit and nut trail mix for the plane ride.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: To Spain For A Little Bit Of Everything: Tapas
programme.desc: Following a trip to Spain, Valerie Bertinelli has developed a love of Spanish foods, especially the small plates, or tapas, that the Spaniards do so brilliantly.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Vacation at Home
programme.desc: Ree Drummond goes global for delicious inspiration while staying cozy in her kitchen. She crosses the Atlantic for an all-in-one take on a Full English Breakfast and heads to North Africa for a Chicken Tagine. Dessert is a trio of Brazilian Brigadeiros.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Tex Mex
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is whipping up four 16-minute Tex-Mex marvels for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. She makes a fried egg-topped Breakfast Tostada for a speedy and satisfying start to the day.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Four In Hand
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has portable food in hand with four fantastic on-the-go ideas. There's breakfast bagel burgers that are the perfect start to the day for a teenage cowboy. Taco chicken Caesar salad wraps are a great on-the-go meal.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast Freezer Faves
programme.desc: It's a busy day on the ranch for Ree Drummond as she fills her freezer with breakfast favorites and makes breakfast for the guys out working cattle. Her to-make list includes freezer breakfast paninis and very berry croissants.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Girl Meets Ice
