programme.desc: With the stay-at-home order finally lifted, the divas of Dallas are ready to make the most of their quarantine bubble, as safely as possible. Kameron gets a new dog and hosts a socially distanced garage sale.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: You Dim Sum, You Lose Some
programme.desc: Tiffany throws a Dim Sum brunch and finds herself going head to head with Kameron.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Kary'd Away
programme.desc: Stephanie starts a charitable foundation and encounters nothing but resistance from Travis, while Tiffany’s demanding mother makes her feel like nothing she does is ever good enough. Kameron hosts an outrageous party for Kary’s 50th birthday.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Kim and Kroy
programme.desc: A one-hour special of never-before-seen-moments from Kim and Kroy's whirlwind romance which began at a charity dance, led to a baby, a new house and now to the altar.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Hairstylists Tell All
programme.desc: Atlanta hairstylists Lawrence and Derek J share some of their favourite moments with the ladies. As they count down and show their favourite clips, they offer their colourful insight and spill the beans on the women.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Got Sexy Back
programme.desc: While NeNe considers a reconciliation with Gregg, Kandi and her new man move in together. Meanwhile, a pregnant Kim faces a potential eviction from her dream home.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Excess Breeds Success
programme.desc: NeNe continues her reign of fame and fabulousness in Los Angeles as she promotes her new sitcom, "The New Normal." Meanwhile back in Atlanta, Kim celebrates a birthday with the thought of homelessness looming on the horizon.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Call Me Miss U.S.A
programme.desc: Kenya gets invited to a high-class fundraising event for the well-known charity in Atlanta, Hosea Feeds the Homeless. Meanwhile, NeNe takes a trip to New York for some meetings, and she and Cynthia spend a day exploring the city.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Unmoved
programme.desc: Kim is forced to relocate her growing family into her old townhouse, giving the other ladies plenty to talk about. Porsha is still fuming over her fight with Kenya, but Kenya keeps her eyes on the ultimate prize: a ring around her finger.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: No Excuse for Excuses
programme.desc: As the ladies plan their trip to Anguilla, tensions rise and their friendships are questioned. Porsha plans to double her fertility trouble after revealing that she will do anything to have twins. Kim's commitment to friendship is called into question.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Hold on to Your Weave
programme.desc: As the ladies attempt to deal with the aftermath of a blowout with Kim, Cynthia and Peter decide to move forward and invite another couple to fill Kim and Kroy's place. In walk replacements Porsha and her football star husband, Kordell Stewart.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: I Do...But, I Won't
programme.desc: Romance is in the air and a housewife decides to say 'I do' during this couples trip to Anguilla. In paradise, NeNe begins to question Kenya's behavior and her relationship with her boyfriend Walter. This infuriates Kenya and puts her on the defence.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Fools of Engagement
programme.desc: As the Anguilla trip comes to an end, there is still unfinished business to be addressed. Kenya hopes to leave the island with an engagement ring, while NeNe focuses on squashing her bumpy past with Kandi. Cynthia works to clear the air with Kenya.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Dress Down and Strip Bare
programme.desc: Back from Anguilla, relationships are tested and this time it's not only Kenya and Walter in the romantic hot seat. Divorce rumors swirl around Phaedra and Apollo, while Kandi and Todd's relationship moves forward after a visit from a pastor.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Off The Hook
programme.desc: As NeNe prepares to leave for Los Angeles to begin shooting 'The New Normal', she has many challenges thrown her way. Kandi and her boo continue to settle into their new life together, causing her to confide in Porsha about the thought of marriage.

programme.title: Dateline: The Trap

programme.title: Dateline: The Trap

programme.title: Dateline: The Women and Dirty John

programme.title: Dateline: The Target

programme.title: Framed by the Killer: A Lover's Frame

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Boys of Bummer

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue
programme.desc: The big blue is the world's greatest wilderness. It is a marine desert far from shore and many kilometers deep with nothing to eat and nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas
programme.desc: In our green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coasts

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth: January-February: The Year Begins
programme.desc: As the Earth's axial tilt brings a scorching summer to some places and frigid winter to others, life must adapt to the extreme conditions.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: One Ocean

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep
programme.desc: Visit the unknown to discover an unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed. Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Hollywood Horror Story
programme.desc: In 2012, hikers in Los Angeles' Hollywood Hills discover the severed head of Hervey Medellin, a retired flight clerk. The cast of suspects includes former lovers, drug cartels and a murderous porn star, in a tale of lust, greed and butchery.

programme.title: Brittany Murphy: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: Drugs, disease and scandals when Hollywood superstar Brittany Murphy dies at age 32, the world is stunned. Many believe foul play must be involved. Brittany's father searches for answers as lurid allegations against other family members mount.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: Ernest and Charlene Scherer are found beaten and stabbed to death in their exclusive Northern California community. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, until investigators hone in on the motive.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Hollywood Horror Story
programme.desc: In 2012, hikers in Los Angeles' Hollywood Hills discover the severed head of Hervey Medellin, a retired flight clerk. The cast of suspects includes former lovers, drug cartels and a murderous porn star, in a tale of lust, greed and butchery.

programme.title: Brittany Murphy: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: Drugs, disease and scandals when Hollywood superstar Brittany Murphy dies at age 32, the world is stunned. Many believe foul play must be involved. Brittany's father searches for answers as lurid allegations against other family members mount.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: Ernest and Charlene Scherer are found beaten and stabbed to death in their exclusive Northern California community. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, until investigators hone in on the motive.

programme.title: The Crimes That Changed Us: Selena
programme.desc: A Mexican-American singer is on the cusp of international superstardom when one fateful visit to a Texas motel cuts her young life tragically short. Fans clamor for justice as police negotiators stand-off with an unlikely killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: Word of Faith
programme.desc: To this day, lost souls flock to North Carolina where they're promised deliverance from demons by Pastor Jane Whaley at the Word of Faith Fellowship. But deliverance comes at a price, including beatings, medical horrors, and psychological abuse.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: Manson Family Murders
programme.desc: In the late 60s, Charles Manson entices dozens of young women to live with him in a California desert commune. The facade breaks when Manson orders his followers to commit a string of gruesome murders that 50 years later, still haunt the nation's psyche.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: The Original Amish Murderer
programme.desc: When Katie Gingerich is found murdered and disemboweled, even the most hardened police are shocked.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: Twisted Confession
programme.desc: Anna Borntregger has been dead for 10 years, so when her husband suddenly tells police he murdered her they don't know what to make of his confession.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Alley of Death
programme.desc: When 14-year old Gloria Pointer is found raped and murdered in an alleyway, it is the start of a thirty-year quest for answers by her mother who will not give up until she finds justice for her daughter.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Heartbreak Hotel
programme.desc: Beautiful Northwestern Airlines flight attendant Nancy Ludwig is discovered dead in her hotel room, her body mutilated and head almost decapitated. It will take the discovery of links to another heinous killing to blow the case wide open.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: 'Til Death Do Us Part" takes on a whole new meaning when a wife of thirty-four years loses the love of her life after he's kidnapped and she's nearly killed by his abductor. But nothing is what it seems in this gothic tale of murder, deceit and cover-up.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: She Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: A young Iranian mom and wife lands the perfect job with a Portland insurance agency. But her charm and intellect make her the focus for several male co-workers. Corporate intrigue turns to cold-blooded murder when she's found dead, shot in the head.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cooking with Fire
programme.desc: After leaving a violent ex-husband and firing a problem employee, 21-year-old Cathy Whitehead is happy to build a life with the man of her dreams. But when a stranger shows up on her doorstep one night, she's soon caught up in the web of a familiar foe.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hysteria Lane
programme.desc: A couple who tragically lost their son are thrilled when a family with two boys moves in across the street. But the relationship soon sours, engulfing all of them in conflict, accusation, and finally a deadly shooting.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: On the night before Halloween, a real-life nightmare unfolds when a young man is found clinging to life. The case takes a dark turn when Lt. Joe Kenda learns there is a second victim somewhere in the woods. Can police rescue him before it's too late?

programme.title: True Conviction: The Final Call
programme.desc: A young wife and mother is brutally murdered in her own home, and her family shot and left for dead.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: Learn that our Halloween's origins aren't all that ancient and that Edgar Allan Poe is not the madman that others have made him out to be.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Flying Machines
programme.desc: Man created flying devices in order to travel the world and fly into space. Learn about Apollo 11 and how it came home with the help of a pen and about Air Force One, which is not a machine, but a code name.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Alcatraz
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up
programme.desc: Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Attempt to discover if there is a hidden 'shadow government' that guards the truth, even from the President.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Outlaw Bikers
programme.desc: Go inside the tightly guarded clubs of outlaw bikers to witness the story that hasn't been told. Discover the truth behind their organizations, and find out if they're really international crime syndicates or social clubs for outcasts and nonconformists.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Trick or Treat

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, but discover what the reality was.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Big Wow on Alabama's Lake Wedowee
programme.desc: After spending years renting on Lake Wedowee in Alabama, Chris and Jenny are ready to purchase a vacation home for their family. A local agent helps the couple land a charming lakefront property, but it's in need of major improvements.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Northeast Texas Turnaround
programme.desc: A Minnesota couple searches for a vacation home in Texas that reminds them of their home state. Their agent helps them find a lakefront property in northeast Texas that may be their dream home, but its current state requires quite a bit of TLC.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lone Star State Update
programme.desc: After spending years living all over the world, Teresa and Jeremy find the perfect vacation home for their family in their home state of Texas. They're ready to put down roots, but their new lakefront home is in need of some TLC.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Rework in Wisconsin
programme.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan and they're doing all the renovation work themselves. He's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lake Country Lounging
programme.desc: A family finds a fixer-upper in Lake Country, Wisconsin, in hopes of turning it into a lakefront retreat with a boat dock. The house's outdated style and need for major repairs may break the budget, dashing their lakeside dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp
programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fowl Territory
programme.desc: Alton shares his favourite weeknight meal, Cornish game hen, with an eye on food safety. From the grocery store to the leftovers, he shows how to shop, prep, cook, and even grill while providing guidelines and tools for proper food handling and clean up.

programme.title: Good Eats: Express Yourself
programme.desc: Alton Brown thought we could use some education about true espresso.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fungal Gourmet: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2000 with new recipes for mushroom stroganoff and pickled mushrooms. Oh, and there's a visit from a certain insect who just so happens to be made of some of the same materials as mushrooms.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Icing Man Cometh

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweets All Day Long
programme.desc: Check out three unique places that satisfy any sweet tooth from sunrise to sundown. At the Wandering Goose in Seattle, they push the sweet boundaries with Southern goodies like chocolate chip cookies with toffee and crispy chicken skin.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Luscious Layers
programme.desc: Three unique sweet spots that deliver layers of incredible flavors and textures. Union Fare Bakery in New York City is flipping the switch on the classic croissant and baking up flavors like red velvet and birthday cake.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Seattle Sweets
programme.desc: At Rodeo Donut, small-batch brioche doughnuts wake your taste buds up with the perfect mix of spicy and sweet. At Amandine Bakeshop, you get a taste of France.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Imagination
programme.desc: Life's too short for boring desserts, so we're sinking our teeth into some of the country's most imaginative sweets. Moojo is helping keep Austin weird and oh so delicious with customized ice cream sandwiches made with warm cookies.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Desert Desserts
programme.desc: Head to the Arizona desert to find some of the coolest desserts. At Fluff It Marshmallows in Gilbert, they're all about magnificent marshmallow and flavor possibilities.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Spins In Austin
programme.desc: In Austin, we find a unique spin on sweet treats at every turn. Sugar Mama's Bakeshop serves up sweet surprises like old-fashioned chocolate malted milkshake cupcakes and shortbread unicorns with edible glitter.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: United Tastes of America
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson is the guide on a mouthwatering trip to sample all the classic, iconic dishes of America. From delicious desserts on the Florida coast to spicy-hot chili in the Lone Star State, this is the best way to experience the USA.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Spice Up Your Life
programme.desc: Forget about standard spicy seasonings. Eddie Jackson rounds up dishes made with the hottest, zippiest and peppiest peppers out there.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Bay Area
programme.desc: San Francisco proves that barbeque is not strictly southern, with the pork bun at Yank Sing.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Seattle
programme.desc: In Seattle, the crab cakes are so good it's an obsession, and you can find a seriously good slice of pizza at Serious Pie.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Vegas
programme.desc: Better bet it all on finding amazing food in Las Vegas as they know how to double down.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: The Ozarks
programme.desc: Andrew visits the Ozarks where hunting and fishing are still a central way of life.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Alaska's Inside Passage
programme.desc: Andrew gets a whole new taste of Alaska when he visits the Inside Passage. Andrew finds out that people in this part of Alaska are still making the most of the bounty that nature has provided. He tries sea cucumbers, salmon eggs, and roasted fish heads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Hampshire Seacoast
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores New Hampshire's seacoast and finds that the bounty of the local waters is the star of the local cuisine, such as shrimp, scallops and haddock stuffed in a baked lobster and loaded into a chowder.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand. From coconut curry soup to a signature sausage with pork and chile paste, fish roasted in banana leaves to minced pork salad, the northern city has a regional cuisine unlike any other.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phnom Penh
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern discovers the complex flavors of Phnom Penh, Cambodia. Spicy grilled crab, cold and refreshing beef salad and herbaceous fish and noodle soup reflect a mission to preserve the uniqueness of Cambodian cuisine.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town / The Last Pup-icorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.title: Bluey: Keepy Uppy / Magic Xylophone / Shadowlands
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the house with a balloon; Bluey and Bingo argue over a magic xylophone; Bluey, Coco and Snickers play a game called Shadowlands.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Purrfect Little Helper/ The Colorful Chameleon
programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Panda Excess/ A Stinky Situation
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must deliver a baby panda so cute that it makes it hard to say goodbye. Later, the fliers have trouble delivering a baby skunk due to its overwhelming smell.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: What to Expect When You're Egg-specting/ Ruffin' It
programme.desc: While in New Zealand, the pugs try to return a large egg before it hatches. When Chloe and Keia lose a special canoe paddle, the pups embark on a wilderness adventure to find it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Search and Rescue / Over the Dog Park Wall
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly are made honorary Coast Guard pups to keep every pet safe! Zeus' flying disc soars into the yard of a protective guard dog.

programme.title: Bluey: Trampoline/ The Dump/ Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.title: Bluey: Hammerbarn / Feather Wand / Dance Mode
programme.desc: While on a trip to the store, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. Later, when Bingo isn't invited to Chloe's party, she uses a magic feather wand to make things incredibly heavy.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Birthday Heros for Hero / Maple Cheer-Up
programme.desc: The pups must fix Hero's new birthday toy after Rolly and Keia accidentally break it. The Pugs head to Canada to save Bob's pancake surprise for Bonnie!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Summer's Big Kerfloofle/ Frog Scouts
programme.desc: When Bunsen and Beaker bring a Floofle to the playroom, it bonds with Summer. Kermit, Robin and Carlos are so excited for their very first Frog Scouts outing, led by Mr. Manny.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Meatball Mayhem / Bunsen Honeydew, Show Stopper
programme.desc: Chef visits the playroom with some not-so tasty meatballs; When Beaker joins Muppet Rocksplosion, Bunsen sabotages their concert...with science!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town / The Last Pup-icorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Scuba-Doggies/ Walking the Bob
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on an underwater adventure to retrieve a lost package. After a visit to the eye doctor, it's up to the pups to lead a blurry-eyed Bob home.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy and Gekko's Robot Rampage/ Owlette's Feathered Friend
programme.desc: When Romeo’s new robot, Robette, gets a screw lose she decides to take over the world by herself. Owlette finds a bird in HQ and decides that she’ll be the perfect pet owner.

programme.desc: When money manager Jeremy Grandon is found murdered in his loft, detectives initially suspected a troubled teen. Then, footage from a hidden camera leads detectives to the victim's secret lover, a star-studded pro-football player.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Confession
programme.desc: When a teenage boy confesses to looking at a website to try to curb his paedophilic urge, Benson and Stabler investigate the 'self-help' website for pedophiles and its creator, Jake Berlin. When the teen goes missing, the detectives race to find him.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Babes
programme.desc: A teenager burned to death puts Detectives Stabler and Munch on the case. Leads reveal a community in chaos, a group of teenaged girls in a pregnancy pact, and a high school 'saint.'

programme.title: Modern Family: The Storm
programme.desc: A huge thunderstorm brings wide power outages, and the whole family congregates at Jay and Gloria's to use their generator. Jay has one foot out the door, though, desperately trying to make it to a reunion with some old Navy buddies.

programme.title: Modern Family: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Claire has somehow turned into super mom, running Jay's closet business and yet still has time for all the duties at home. The kids could not be happier, but Phil could not be more frustrated.

programme.title: Modern Family: Double Click
programme.desc: Claire can't seem to find the right time to fire one of her employees, while back at home Phil thinks he caught Luke with a girl in his bed, and no one seems to notice that Alex has moved back home for the summer.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Tale of Three Cities
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan reunites with all of the families converging at home for Father's Day.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Stereotypical Day
programme.desc: Jay does not want to give the new family moving in across the street the wrong impression and goes out of his way to make sure they know he is the best kind of neighbour.

programme.title: The Rev: Meet the Hartleys
programme.desc: Richard returns to find a choir that's out of tune and adult children that may never move out.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Avatar
programme.desc: Time quickly runs out when a woman involved in virtual reality video games goes missing.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Savant
programme.desc: Ben Nicholson finds his wife Corrine beaten into a coma, and the only witness to the crime is their mentally challenged daughter, Katie. Because of Katie's sensitive mental state, the detectives are reluctant to have her testify.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Svengali
programme.desc: When a college student is found murdered, detectives suspect a copycat serial killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Blinded
programme.desc: When Olivia and Elliot discover a kidnapped girl in the trunk of a stolen rental car, they are led to her violent, schizophrenic abductor. The case forces Casey to face the reality of her own dark past.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Sans Voir (Part One)

programme.title: NCIS: Terminal Leave
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team protect an Iraqi war veteran after a bomb is planted in her car.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Devil Complex

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Puts You on That Ledge

programme.title: The Closer: Ruby

programme.title: Major Crimes: Special Master
programme.desc: Phillip Stroh returns and is demanding a new deal from DDA Rios in exchange for his cooperation regarding 'future murders.' In a race against the clock to prevent three deaths, Major Crimes works to save the victims while decoding Stroh's information.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Special Master
programme.desc: The Major Crimes division is in overdrive working to stop a serial killer who has been targeting female sex workers. To interpret the facts, Captain Sharon Raydor reaches outside her division to a consultant to help reverse engineer a decade of murders.

programme.title: Major Crimes: A Rose Is a Rose

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: Dangerous Illusion (Part 2)
programme.desc: Roy tries to recover from severe wounds inflicted by his beloved tiger Mantacore, but the team’s excuses for the animal’s behavior lose credibility upon further investigation.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Monica Lewinsky Scandal

programme.title: How It Really Happened: What Killed Heath Ledger?
programme.desc: Whether Heath Ledger's immersion into the role of 'The Joker' impacted his personal life and strange drawings and clues found in his apartment are investigated.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: An adventurous couple builds a home with self-sustaining features near the Ozark National Forest. While they both have renovation experience, building on the dangerous mountainside terrain in a location plagued by flash foods will be a challenge.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin Wanderlust
programme.desc: A young cabin builder creates a one-of-a-kind cabin in upstate New York during the harsh winter months. Due to the new and complicated design, the crew must adapt to the environment, work efficiently and leave no room for mistakes.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Homestead Heartache
programme.desc: As the Fox Cabin nears completion, Atz Sr. unites seven Kilcher siblings to finish the interior of his legacy rebuild. Jane, August and Etienne embark on the final fishing trip of the year and Eivin suffers a devastating loss.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Breaking Point
programme.desc: The Kilchers rush to prepare for the arrival of winter. Otto saves a friend's home from sinking into the bay. The stress of parenting during the pandemic pushes Eve to her breaking point and Atz Sr. stalks a menacing bear on the homestead.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vail Log Cabin
programme.desc: The Walker family rebuilds their 100 year old mining cabin in the Colorado wilderness. Fortunately, they're a family of engineers who are game for any challenges. The tools used for this project will be as old as the cabin itself!

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Breaking Point
programme.desc: The Kilchers rush to prepare for the arrival of winter. Otto saves a friend's home from sinking into the bay. The stress of parenting during the pandemic pushes Eve to her breaking point and Atz Sr. stalks a menacing bear on the homestead.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Bad Chadillac
programme.desc: Small-town custom car fabricator Chad Hiltz takes on his first build under his new banner at Hiltz Automotive. The team takes a stubborn '57 Cadillac and transforms it into a futuristic, chromed-out roadster fit for a king.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Trucker's Dream
programme.desc: The Hiltz Auto Company team pulls out all the stops for a local trucker with a dream. Using Chad's vintage toys as inspiration and utilizing Colton's improved welding skills, the team converts a '34 Oldsmobile sedan into a unique, functioning dump truck.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Hot Rod From Heaven
programme.desc: The 10th-Annual Rockabilly Weekend car show is right around the corner and Chad has big plans for this year's raffle car! The team races to transform a rusted-out '38 Ford into an open-motor, fenderless hotrod that's guaranteed to sell tickets.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Bad Chad to the Bone
programme.desc: Chad gets pushed to his limits when a local body shop owner tasks him with his first-ever motorcycle build. With the Wharf Rat Bike Rally just two weeks away, Chad races the clock to visualize, customize and materialize the one-of-a-kind chopper.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Loud and Nasty
programme.desc: An old-time motorhead tasks Chad with building an open-wheel race car. On a limited budget, Chad decides to start with an antique engine and build the car around it but getting the engine running is a tricky task that may require a miracle to achieve.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: This Is So Farfegnugen
programme.desc: Aaron decides to build a 'junkyard Porsche' capable of going head-to-head against Richard's 2015 Porsche 911 Turbo S. It goes awry when the expensive conversion kits he's bought don't fit as planned.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Germany Meet America
programme.desc: While Richard heads off to make the steal of a lifetime on four rare Mustangs, Aaron and the Monkeys fight to finish their junkyard Porsche in time for their big race against Richard's new $200,000 Porsche Turbo S.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Hot off the Pantera
programme.desc: Looking to make a smash debut at an all-new Barrett-Jackson auction in eight weeks, Richard buys into Aaron's plan to build a first-ever '72 Pantera fitted with a custom turbo-charged Ford EcoBoost V6 engine.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Pan-tera's Labyrinth
programme.desc: A last minute problem arises with the turbo-charged EcoBoost '72 Ford Pantera Aaron is building for the new Barrett-Jackson Northeast, which in turn, forces Richard to gamble by bringing his quarter-million dollar 2005 Ford GT to the auction instead.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Million Dollar Monkey
programme.desc: With Aaron headed off again to Pike's Peak, he tasks the Monkeys with building a '55 Chevy that Richard plans to sell with around a million dollars worth of other cars at a Barrett-Jackson auction on the east coast in less than two weeks.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Opening Bid
programme.desc: As Richard gets ready to gamble selling a million dollars worth of cars at Barrett-Jackson, last-minute problems with their '55 Chevy threaten to keep him from taking it to auction.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: La Casa Del Camino
programme.desc: After Aaron bets Richard that the Monkeys would be able to finish building a 1980 El Camino one week ahead of schedule, last-minute problems threaten to push them past their deadline.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Tippin' the Scales
programme.desc: The Slatons head back to Atlanta to see Dr. Procter. Amy is worried about dropping the news that she got pregnant so soon after surgery, against doctor's orders. Tammy returns knowing she's gained all the weight back.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wake-Up Call
programme.desc: Tammy and Amy blame each other for their issues in therapy. When Tammy gets devastating news from Dr. Procter, her brother Chris makes a life-altering decision. A very pregnant Amy can't stop overeating, and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Tow supervisor Brad oversees the mayhem during Greek Week, and the chaos spills over to the tow lot. Larry tries to manage the offenders, while Roberta's sunny disposition is put to the test.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Chicago tourists push Larry to the breaking point at the impound lot, while ticket supervisor Luz tries to toughen up her nice-guy rookie, Jim.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: By-the-book ticket writer Danielle teaches Philly drivers some tough lessons about parking. John and Rich scramble to find the missing keys to an impounded car as the owner loses her cool.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: At the lot, Yolanda tries to help a young man navigate seemingly insurmountable hurdles to get his car back. Booting team Garfield and Sherry experience divine intervention on the job.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Family Cursed
programme.desc: One family faces two unsolved murders of their loved ones. It takes 13 years for detectives to uncover the one missing clue that can lead them to the killer: the hidden crime scene.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Little Girl Lost
programme.desc: A young girl is kidnapped and killed on her way home from a costume party. Ten years later, a detective's obsessive attention to detail exposing a shocking mistake that kept a suspect on the street for 10 years.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Officer Down/ Secret Twin
programme.desc: Investigators track down a policeman's murderers; a mother keeps the remains of the young daughter she killed.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: Serial rapist James Allen Selby eluded police for years while attacking 11 women in five states: Oklahoma, Nevada, California, Arizona and Colorado.

programme.title: Killer Cases: Murder Under a Blue Moon
programme.desc: After Richard Smith failed to show up for work, police discovered his dead body alongside those of his mother and brother in their home. Deputies told the media they were investigating possible links to the Wiccan religion.

programme.title: Killer Cases: Murder in the Kentucky Hills
programme.desc: Shayna Hubers called 911 to report that she had killed her boyfriend in self-defence. However, investigators soon learned he was planning to date another woman, and suspected there was more to the story.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pantsing With the Stars
programme.desc: The guys pair up to share educational ideas with perplexed parents, then teach Krav Maga to martial arts newbies. When one joker refuses, he becomes the big loser, and faces an opponent that scares the pants off him.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Backyard Cookout Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a late-summer cookout featuring the real star of the Impractical Jokers Movie: Paula Abdul.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Breakfast Foods Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys for another fun glimpse at their lives direct from their home. The fans decide what's on tonight's menu.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Home Town: From the Big Apple to the Little Catfish
programme.desc: A surgeon and his wife are moving to Laurel from New York City, and their all-in budget goes a long way in the Mississippi town. Ben and Erin pay homage to the historic property's original elements and peculiar charm to design an amazing family home.

programme.desc: A woman who has been renting for years is ready to buy a home, and her wish list includes a master bathroom with a big bathtub. Ben and Erin capitalize on the charm of the house and design a Nantucket-inspired kitchen and a stunning master suite.

programme.title: Home Town: Countryside in the City

programme.title: Boise Boys: Ugly Duckling Craftsman Transformed
programme.desc: Luke and Clint snag a 1,373-square-foot Craftsman home in the historic north end of Boise, despite its high cost of renovations.

programme.title: Boise Boys: Boise River Blowout
programme.desc: Luke overspends the budget outbidding hundreds of eager developers on a neglected Boise River house. Forced to start from scratch, they need to go bigger than big to make their money back and see a profit.

programme.title: Boise Boys: All-in on Boise's Central Rim
programme.desc: Luke and Clint have an exclusive offer to purchase a stunning 3,100-square-foot, mid-century modern home on Boise's scenic Central Rim.

programme.title: Boise Boys: Timeless Challenge
programme.desc: Clint and Luke take a risk on a 1906 Victorian in a coveted Boise neighbourhood. They embark on a record-breaking, six-week renovation project. The quick turnaround comes with a variety of issues that threaten to derail the whole project.

programme.title: Boise Boys: Big Space, Small House
programme.desc: Luke and Clint buy a historic 900-square-foot cottage that has been neglected. They have a dilemma on their hands when they must go from a one bedroom, one bath to a two-bedroom, two bath while utilizing the same house footprint.

programme.title: Boise Boys: The Vinyl House
programme.desc: Clint and Luke buy a ranch-style house in Boise's East end. During the renovation they find a surprise stash of vinyl records in the crawlspace, inspiring a music-themed design.

programme.title: Good Bones: First House on the Block
programme.desc: Mina and Karen renovate the first of several houses they purchased on Talbott Street in Indianapolis. The three-bedroom, one-bath home has architectural challenges including a foundation that sags causing the floor to slope.

programme.title: Good Bones: The Gloriously Glam Home
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a vacant lot and what begins as a new construction to sell on the market quickly turns into a build for Mina's friends. However, a lingering pipe issue may add time and a hefty price tag to the project.

programme.title: Good Bones: Saddest Home on Sanders Street
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a crumbling house in the Bates-Hendricks neighbourhood, only to find out it's the first house they can't save. With a clean slate, Mina designs a white beauty with new buyers in mind.

programme.title: Monsters and Mysteries in America: Chupacabra, Zombie Soldier, Lake Worth Monster

programme.title: Monsters and Mysteries in America: Pukwudgie, Aliens, Dover Demon

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Continues

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Call and Response
programme.desc: After receiving a recording of an alleged Bigfoot call, Bryce blasts the howl over a speaker to elicit a response. With Russell positioned high on a hill and Ronny and Mireya down in the valley below, the team may get the encounter they're looking for.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: The Secret of the Red Shed
programme.desc: The AIMS team sets off to track down one of the cloaked figures at the heart of the mystery of Spearfinger. Willy and Wild Bill sneak down for a recon mission, and the team realizes the key to their quest is in the rock overhang and the red shed.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: The Twisted Torch

programme.title: Alien Highway: Legend of the Skinwalker
programme.desc: A recent creature sighting outside the infamous Skinwalker Ranch brings Chuck and the team to Utah to investigate. Evidence both on the ground and in the skies indicates the mysterious shapeshifter might actually be an alien.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions could provide real evidence of the existence of UFOs. The truth about alien contact is not limited to the military, and in fact, many believe such secrets extend well into outer space, even on Mars itself.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs and the Presidents: FDR to JFK
programme.desc: Investigators reveal the secret history between US Presidents and the UFO phenomenon, from FDR's knowledge about a UFO battle over Los Angeles to JFK's alleged plan to share extraterrestrial secrets with the Russians.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Extraterrestrials and Sacred Sites
programme.desc: Startling evidence suggests contact with interstellar travelers in the distant past may have influenced mankind and many of our sacred sites.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: A look at first-hand accounts of mysterious, unknown objects in the skies from pilots and astronauts.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Abduction
programme.desc: Only recently have researchers begun to understand and investigate the phenomenon of alien abduction. While today such claims are dismissed as hoax or delusion, there are time-tested, landmark cases that mainstream scholars struggle to refute.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs vs. the Royal Air Force
programme.desc: The Royal Air Force has been encountering and even engaging UFOs on a regular basis since World War II, but the British government has continuously denied the sightings. Experts investigate why these UFO facts have been concealed.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: This Donkey Kicks

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Battle of the Booty
programme.desc: After Kenya's deal with producing Phaedra's Donkey Booty video turns sour, she decides to produce her own fitness video to rival Phaedra's donkey. The feud intensifies as Phaedra goes on the attack. Nene returns to Atlanta to see her glam baby.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Don't Come for Me Unless I've Invited You

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: The Jet Set and the Upset

programme.title: American Pickers: The Possum Trot
programme.desc: The team goes to a down home country auction called a 'Possum Trot' where the bidding is intense.

programme.title: American Pickers: Mama Knows Best
programme.desc: As Mike and Frank are cruising the back rounds of South Carolina, they stumble on an out-of-the-way property. An atomic-era spaceship clock catches Mike's eye. An incredible collection is stored behind Paulus and Linda's full-service laundromat.

programme.title: American Pickers: California Gold Mine
programme.desc: Freestyling in Los Angeles, Mike and Frank tail a vintage steam car to an auto shop where they uncover an acre of unbelievable junk.

programme.title: American Pickers: Let's Be Frank
programme.desc: The guys discover the jackpot of unusual micro-cars when they head to Illinois.

programme.title: American Pickers: Can't Catch a Break
programme.desc: While Mike makes deal after deal, Frank hits a road block with a straight-talking Wisconsin collector who won't budge on prices.

programme.title: American Pickers: Tick Tock Pick
programme.desc: The guys go hog wild at a sprawling ranch in Texas, where Mike flips for a VW bus that's been transformed into a hunting lodge on wheels. Plus, Frank finds a storied heirloom that reignites a high school obsession.

programme.title: American Pickers: The $90,000 Question
programme.desc: Mike and Frank try to gather up enough cash to seal the deal on one of the rarest motorcycles in the world.

programme.title: American Pickers: Frank's Folly
programme.desc: Mike and Danielle head out with an architectural salvage crew on a unique mission. Robbie and Frank look for treasure in former theatre that is now a prop warehouse.

programme.title: American Pickers: Aerosmith Van
programme.desc: Mike and Frank catch up with Aerosmith's van in Vegas, then take it down the strip to meet their rock star idols for the big reveal.

programme.title: Movie: West Side Story
programme.desc: Two star-crossed lovers attempt to live outside the violence of their rivalling gangs.

programme.title: Movie: What's Up, Doc?
programme.desc: Howard Bannister and his fiancée travel to San Francisco to compete for a musicology research grant, but a college drop out seems determined to confuse and embarrass him at every turn.

programme.title: Movie: Send Me No Flowers
programme.desc: A hypochondriac mistakenly thinks he is dying and sets out to find a husband for his wife.

programme.title: Movie: Sunday in New York
programme.desc: Following a break-up, a prim 22-year-old woman visits her brother in New York. While he tries to meet up with his latest flame, his sister decides to have some fun of her own.

programme.title: Movie: Rosita
programme.desc: A peasant singer attracts the King.

programme.title: Movie: Kika
programme.desc: A make-up artist falls in love with a man whom she brought back to life.

programme.title: Movie: Flower of My Secret
programme.desc: A depressed author gets support from friends and family as she tries to rebuild her life.

programme.title: Movie: Strictly Unconventional
programme.desc: A wife considering running away with her lover looks to her mother-in-law for inspiration.

programme.title: Movie: Our Betters

programme.title: Movie: Isle of Fury
programme.desc: A reformed killer, now a fisherman, rescues the detective assigned to find him.

programme.title: Movie: The Letter
programme.desc: A woman claims to have killed in self-defense, until a blackmailer turns up with incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Movie: The Right to Live

programme.title: Movie: Trio
programme.desc: A trilogy of Somerset Maugham's greatest stories, including a church verger.

programme.title: Movie: The Painted Veil
programme.desc: An unfaithful wife eventually falls in love with her husband for the first time.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Most Interesting Mom in the World
programme.desc: While doing a school report on their mom, Booker and Nia lie about Raven’s life to make their presentation seem more exciting.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Sister Pact
programme.desc: Sydney and her friends make a pact to go to the dance together without dates. She finds herself in a pickle when Ned asks her to the dance. Max recalls his first school dance when Leo and his mom gave him tips on how to ask a girl to be his date.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Girlz II Women
programme.desc: Sydney gets her first period, and when she has an accident at school, she's too upset and wants to sit out her bass solo at the school concert.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: My Best Friends' Ending

programme.title: Jessie: Are You Cooler Than a 5th Grader?

programme.title: Jessie: Romancing the Crone
programme.desc: Jessie and the kids must think of a creative way to retrieve the tiara Jessie dropped on Mrs. Chesterfield's terrace when she refuses to give it back. They decide to ask Bertram to ask her on a date so they can recover Mrs. Ross' tiara.

programme.title: Jessie: The Princess and the Pea Brain
programme.desc: Fairy tales come alive when Jessie and Zuri read a bedtime story that places the gang in medieval times. Jessie is excited and Tony is jealous when Brody asks her on a date.

programme.title: Jessie: Star Wars

programme.title: Bunk'd: Rise of the Machine
programme.desc: Noah and Ava face a new challenge when they take over the 'PeeWeeWaka' day camp program for younger campers. Meanwhile, Destiny and Finn express very different styles when they co-host the camp radio news show.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: The Note

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Gabby Duran: Genius
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl lands a job babysitting unruly extraterrestrial children.

programme.title: Jessie: Snack Attack
programme.desc: When Jessie notices a famous casting director in the park, she tries to impress him by volunteering to help his daughter befriend the Ross kids.

programme.title: Jessie: Acting With the Frenemy
programme.desc: Jessie becomes fast friends with Chloe in acting class. Things are going great until Chloe starts stealing Jessie's ideas for a character and enlists Ravi to help make sure she gets a role in an indie film over Jessie.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Breaking Barb
programme.desc: The Southern Northeast Conference of Camp Directors encourages Lou and Barb to participate in a camp director swap program.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lou's Still the Boss but Now There's a Ross
programme.desc: Camp director Lou, counselors Ava and Noah and campers Destiny, Matteo and Finn are delighted when Emma, fresh from her glamorous career as a fashion designer in Milan, pays a surprise visit to Camp Kikiwaka.

programme.title: Jessie: Break-Up and Shape-Up
programme.desc: Jessie becomes threatened when Tony has to train a beautiful girl named Victoria as a doorman. Things get messy when Jessie's old boyfriend Ted comes to town and she finds herself attracted to him.

programme.title: Jessie: Diary of a Mad Newswoman
programme.desc: Things become intense when Bryn comes back to be Emma's co-anchor at school. Meanwhile, when Jessie finds out Zuri is snooping through her diary, she teaches her a lesson.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Beauties and Bullies
programme.desc: Trish lands the lead role in the school play, but when she reads mean-spirited online comments, she wants to quit the production. Austin and Ally write a special song for Trish to help her understand that she's not alone.

programme.title: Jessie: Used Karma
programme.desc: After Jessie accepts an invitation for lunch with Tony, the building's doorman, Emma offers Jessie unsolicited dating advice she has learned from her stash of teen magazines. Meanwhile, Ravi becomes the target of Luke's practical jokes.

programme.desc: A typical summer morning for four-year-old Heidi Jones turned into a nightmare when she found her mother dead in the living room. Law enforcement work feverishly to solve the murder of Loretta Jones. An exhumation is the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Twist

programme.desc: Gibbs calls on the team to assist DEA Agent Luis Mitchell with a case that keeps going cold. Also, the team gossips about Gibbs' new look after he replaces his standard military haircut and polo shirt for a modern cut and tailored dress shirt.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Ascension
programme.desc: While Sam and Deeks recover from traumatic torture that will have a lasting impact on their personal and professional relationships, the team searches for stolen nuclear weapons.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Impact
programme.desc: In an effort to help Sam and Deeks return to work, Hetty calls upon operational psychologist Nate Getz to help them cope with their traumatic experience. Meanwhile, the rest of the NCIS team investigates the murder of a former admiral and a journalist.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Omni

programme.title: NCIS: Double Trouble

programme.desc: The Jersey Shore is in for a dose of discipline when Cesar heads for the boardwalk to help three families deal with their out of control dogs' situations.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar Conquers London
programme.desc: Cesar is back in the United Kingdom for another episode of Dog Whisperer, but it isn't all garden parties and high tea.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: With Cesar's UK holiday drawing to a close, he lends a hand to the rehabilitation of three British canines.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bad Dogs of Comedy

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Ready, Vet, Go!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Rock N' Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol is visited by his Dutch family and Charles L.A. lady.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hog Days of Summer
programme.desc: Michigan's hot summer is taking a toll on both Dr. Pol and the local farm animals. A think blanket of humidity is making it hard for Dr. Pol and Charles to save a newborn calf with pneumonia. Meanwhile, Dr. Brenda helps a stubborn pig give birth.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Red, White and Moo
programme.desc: Before enjoying the fourth of July, Dr. Pol must take care of the animals. Brenda prescribes anti-anxiety medication to a puppy so she can get through the fireworks and Dr. Pol tries to help a very sick dog in distress.

programme.title: How It's Made: The Very First Episode
programme.desc: Follow the production process of aluminum foil, snowboards, soft polymer contact lenses and bread and find out how each of these items is made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Time-Delay Locks, Brownies, Pallet Dispensers, and Crystal Chandeliers
programme.desc: The ins and outs of how time-delay locks, brownies, pallet dispensers, and crystal chandeliers are made.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost of Black Mountain
programme.desc: Ghostly remnants of a beautifully constructed town in the remote backwoods of Kentucky suggests a forgotten tale of utter catastrophe and devastation; experts investigate and uncover the dark and oppressive history of a deadly industrial mining complex.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Washington, DC Reborn
programme.desc: Washington, DC was built as the capital city of a new, revolutionary country, and it's home to some of America's greatest wonders; now, experts use cutting-edge engineering to reimagine what this place would look like if we had to build it again.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Mysteries in the Vault
programme.desc: Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard must help a forensic geologist who informs them of new, advanced testing that could verify the authenticity of the runestone, but a new challenge might put their investigation in jeopardy.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Washington, DC Reborn
programme.desc: Washington, DC was built as the capital city of a new, revolutionary country, and it's home to some of America's greatest wonders; now, experts use cutting-edge engineering to reimagine what this place would look like if we had to build it again.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Washington, DC Reborn
programme.desc: Washington, DC was built as the capital city of a new, revolutionary country, and it's home to some of America's greatest wonders; now, experts use cutting-edge engineering to reimagine what this place would look like if we had to build it again.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a classified Soviet machine built to prevent all-out nuclear war, a top secret Nazi facility, and a strange tower that left an enduring legacy.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Doomsday at Dragon's Teeth
programme.desc: Eerie ghost ships stranded in an alien desert, sinister ruins known as the Dragon's Teeth, and a ghostly complex with a bloody past are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town
programme.desc: A strange deserted city in America's heartland, an eerie gigantic wall deep in snow-capped mountains, and a mysterious top-secret Soviet facility were built and then abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: See No Evil: At Michelle's Door
programme.desc: The News Year's disappearance of Michelle Thornton leads to a gruesome discovery. With no witnesses, only the four security cameras from her apartment building can help decipher what happened.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: First Love, Forever Evil
programme.desc: Melissa Holland was certain that her high school boyfriend, Michael Overstreet, was the man she'd always dreamed of. But only after they were married did she begin to realize that her determination to live happily ever after had put her in mortal danger.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Body in the Freezer
programme.desc: A meeting between two businessmen leaves one shot in the face. Things seem cut and dry until Lt. Kenda realizes the 'victim' could actually be the aggressor, shot struggling over his own gun. The key to the case lies in the deal they were discussing.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: Brilliant schoolboy Breck Bednar has a passion for computers and gaming. But when he's introduced to a successful entrepreneur online, passion turns to obsession and the game becomes deadly.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Chase Me
programme.desc: A 50-year-old woman is found dead in her home. All that's left behind is a note that reads, 'Chase me.' But when detectives uncover the killer, they quickly discover they have come face to face with a remorseless psychopath.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Into the Woods at Midnight
programme.desc: Residents of a quaint village are terrified when a local innkeeper and two others are found brutally murdered. Detectives in Maine must follow the depraved killer into the woods at night as he leads them to where he killed and buried his fourth victim.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Werewolf Butcher
programme.desc: When Jack 'Roy' Spillman started collecting wolf memorabilia, his sisters thought it was just an odd hobby. But when they learned of horrific things he had done, they realized some people may have been right when they called him 'more animal than human.'

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Gone in Less Than 3 Minutes
programme.desc: A teenage lifeguard vanishes from a quiet community swimming hole less than three minutes after her mother dropped her off for work.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Crocodile Tears
programme.desc: Salvador Vaca Garcia tearfully appears on local news when his girlfriend disappears. John Walsh scrutinizes Vaca Garcia's story. Later, Callahan Walsh looks at Brian Keith Freeman who allegedly slits his fiancé's throat when their engagement falls apart.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Werewolf Butcher

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Into the Woods at Midnight
programme.desc: Residents of a quaint village are terrified when a local innkeeper and two others are found brutally murdered. Detectives in Maine must follow the depraved killer into the woods at night as he leads them to where he killed and buried his fourth victim.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Tom and Juanita give their love one more shot when they take a second honeymoon. But for the Richardsons, there are no second chances-just a sharp cliff with a long way to fall.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Burning Love
programme.desc: Hattie Rennolds is struggling to provide for her daughter in Baton Rouge when she meets her dream man. Within a year they're married and Hattie is pregnant. But when they divorce, chaos enters an already volatile custody dispute, and someone ends up dead.

programme.title: True Conviction: Witness to a Nightmare
programme.desc: A Philadelphia mother is murdered at home, execution-style- right before her child's eyes. The hunt for her killer leads to a maddening series of dead ends until months later, when the case breaks in an astonishing direction.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Lies or Alibis
programme.desc: Scott Davis' past caught up to him when he found himself on trial for murdering his estranged wife's new boyfriend 10 years earlier. Now his family has called in Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva to investigate what they believe is a miscarriage of justice.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Stacy's Story
programme.desc: A mother finds her teenage daughter savagely murdered inside their own home. A few drops of blood discovered decades later may be the key to solving the tragic mystery.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Predator in Deerfield
programme.desc: When a young mother and her 6-month-old child disappear off the quiet streets of Deerfield Beach Florida, it is the beginning of a terrifying murder mystery.

programme.title: True Crime With Aphrodite Jones: Too Young to Die
programme.desc: When 15 year old Annie Kasprzak was found brutally murdered, her foster parents were devastated. It would take a dedicated rookie detective shifting through false leads and digital forensics to uncover the shocking truth of what happened to Annie.

programme.title: Extreme Measures: The Boy with the Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: A mother's love of her son compels her to go face-to-face with a local thug she thinks killed her oldest child.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade: The Heartland Massacre
programme.desc: In the heart of America's devastating Farm Crisis, the largest mass murder in recent Missouri history stuns a small town. An entire family is wiped out. The unlikely suspect is a 14-year-old boy… but the real extent of the horror is even more shocking.

programme.title: Killer Bods: Blood, Sweat, and Tears
programme.desc: An ominous mystery grips a small, seaside town when the husband of a competitive bodybuilder abruptly disappears. Puzzling sightings, shocking revelations and bizarre deceptions eventually lead police to a grisly discovery where it's least expected.

programme.title: Killer Carnies: The Sideshow Murders
programme.desc: A brutal murder sent shock waves through the carnival community, and every performer is a suspect. But with the death of Lobster Boy, truths will be revealed, and a reign of terror will meet a shocking end. Life at the carnival will forever change.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: The Bedroom Basher
programme.desc: A young pregnant woman is raped and bludgeoned in California. It looks like the work of a serial killer called 'The Bedroom Basher.' But when she regains her memory, she blames her husband.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.
